❯ Run this exact shell command, nothing else: echo waypoint-probe-hello

● Bash(echo waypoint-probe-hello)
  ⎿  waypoint-probe-hello

● waypoint-probe-hello

✻ Cogitated for 5s

❯ Create a new file named probe_out.txt containing exactly the text: waypoint-probe

● Write(probe_out.txt)
